model.title: NASA/JPL approximate Keplerian elements
model.extrapolationDisclosure: NASA/JPL's element fit ends at 3000 CE. Secular rates are extrapolated from 3000 to 4000 CE, so later positions are illustrative.

method.rounding: largest remainder to one decimal place
method.timelineEncoding: Each [minute offset, planet] starts a nearest-neighbor run measured from the interval start.
